title: FMD - Both earbuds connected
scenario: Find My Device correctly shows Voyager Free 60+ as a single device on the map in Poly Studio Mobile app
steps: Open the Poly Studio Mobile app on your mobile device.
Ensure a Voyager Free 60+ (Osprey) device is connected via Bluetooth.
Tap on the Find My Device feature.
Observe the map view showing the device location.
expected: The Voyager Free 60+ (Osprey) device appears as a single unit on the map, not as two separate earbuds.
